case_title: MID-CENTURY INSURANCE CO., vs. GHANNAM, IBRAHIM et al

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GHANNAM, IBRAHIM $3,089.05 PRINCIPAL, $431.14 INTEREST, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,654.19
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF MID-CENTURY INSURANCE CO.
